---
title: "Exploratory Data Analysis on Iris Dataset"
author: "Alekhya Gangopadhyay"
output: word_document
---

# 1. Introduction
The Iris dataset is a popular dataset used for data analysis and machine learning. It contains measurements of iris flowers from three different species.

---

# 2. Load Dataset

```{r}
data(iris)
head(iris)
str(iris)
summary(iris)
colSums(is.na(iris))
hist(iris$Sepal.Length, col="lightblue", main="Sepal Length Distribution")
boxplot(iris$Petal.Length, main="Petal Length")
table(iris$Species)
plot(iris$Sepal.Length, iris$Petal.Length, col=iris$Species, pch=19)
cor(iris[,1:4])
pairs(iris[,1:4], col=iris$Species)
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(iris, aes(x=Sepal.Length, y=Petal.Length, color=Species)) +
  geom_point(size=3) +
  theme_minimal()
aggregate(. ~ Species, data=iris, mean)
